home.role: Front-End Developer · Digital Design & Creation Student
home.aboutMe: I started my journey in programming when I decided to take a vocational training course in Web Application Development. Currently, I am pursuing a degree in Digital Design and Creation at the Universitat Oberta de Catalunya (UOC). My professional goal is to build my career as a UX/UI designer and developer.

projects.title: PROJECTS
projects.honestamente: I collaborated on the development of Honestamente's website, a psychologist's website. I worked with WordPress and Elementor to create sections and content, implemented animations with GSAP, and contributed to SEO and performance optimization.
projects.oceanWinds: I carried out various collaboration tasks on the Ocean Winds website, working with WordPress and Elementor to create content and sections, implementing animations with GSAP, and making SEO and optimization adjustments.
projects.genexit: I participated in the development of a web application with Angular and TypeScript for Genexit, working with modular components, state management with RxJS, and a responsive interface optimized for performance.
projects.f5Futsal: I developed the complete F5 Futsal website in collaboration with a fellow intern. The project includes creating a sports website with WordPress and Elementor, implementing GSAP animations, responsive design, performance and SEO optimization, and complete site structure configuration to display the club information.
projects.f5FutsalNote: The page was removed, so the link takes you to the Wayback Machine page.

role1.description: Delivered high-quality customer service in a fast-paced, high-traffic retail environment. Managed continuous, organized product restocking to ensure consistent stock availability. Resolved customer issues quickly and effectively while providing personalized attention to individual questions and needs.

role2.description: Developed interactive interfaces using Angular, implementing RxJS to manage states and data flows. Built modular components, ensuring maintainable and scalable code. Optimized existing applications through refactoring techniques and used PrimeNG to implement consistent interfaces. Collaborated with the Back-End team, working with Nest.js to integrate functionalities. Managed the entire development process using Git/GitHub in a Scrum environment. As part of the design cycle, I prototyped basic interfaces in Figma to validate ideas before implementation.

role3.description: Developed websites with WordPress, using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP and jQuery to create dynamic and adaptive pages. Implemented tools like Elementor and GSAP for interactive designs, configured and optimized WooCommerce for e-commerce, and worked on SEO to improve positioning and attract organic traffic.

role4.organization: Biodiversity and Ecosystem Volunteer at SCEA - Societat Catalana d'Educació Ambiental
role4.description: Performed comprehensive maintenance of terrestrial, aquatic and urban ecosystems. Conducted studies on pollution of the Llobregat River and analyzed its impact on the natural environment. Contributed to tree planting and ensured they were watered with water from the same river. Additionally, classified birds through personalized banding and maintained detailed records of specimens.
